jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.description: 📣 We’re hiring: Account Manager (NY Market Growth)The Brandoers is expanding in the New York market and we’re looking for someone who wants to grow with the agency, not just execute tasks.Your role:– Account management for 2–3 existing clients– Active involvement in portfolio and agency growth, especially in the early stage, until the team expands– Clear communication, strong organization, and strategic thinking– Ownership mindset and autonomy (no micromanagement)What we offer:– Remote position– Full-time or part-time (4–6 hours) collaboration– Direct exposure to strategy, decision-making, and the NY market– Real growth opportunities as the agency scalesWe’re looking for someone who understands client relationships, keeps things structured, and wants to help build a business — not just maintain one.📩 If this sounds like you, or you know someone who’d be a great fit, send us a message. (bogdan@thebrandoers.com) This is our website: https://thebrandoers.com/

I'm looking for guys who know how to paint and do tile work. Sheetrock and plaster is a plus.My Instagram is @Mania_Renovations.I speak Romanian and they will always be with me so no need for English speaking. Cash pay every week.(maniarenovations@gmail.com)
